name: Apple Chip Snacking Cake
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Semi-Sweet Chocolate Chips or Hershey's
Powdered sugar or whipped topping and ground cinnamon (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease and flour an 8 or 9-inch square baking pan.
3. In a large bowl, beat the eggs slightly. Add oil, apple juice, and vanilla extract.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together flour, granulated sugar, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt.
5. Stir the dry ingredients into the batter until well combined.
6. Add chopped apples, chocolate chips, and nuts; stir until evenly distributed.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes or until the cake pulls away from the sides of the pan.
9. Allow the cake to cool completely in the pan on a wire rack.
10. Sprinkle powdered sugar over the top, or serve with a dollop of whipped topping and a sprinkle of cinnamon, if desired.
11. Serve 9 servings.
